name: Symantec Corp.
description: Symantec Corporation was a prominent American technology company specializing in cybersecurity and information protection software. Founded in 1982, it became widely known for its Norton-branded security products. In 2019, Broadcom Inc. acquired Symantec's enterprise security business, integrating it into its software portfolio, while the remaining consumer-focused business rebranded as Gen Digital. As a result of these strategic divestitures and acquisitions, Symantec no longer operates as an independent, publicly traded entity under the SYMC ticker, marking a significant transformation in the landscape of global enterprise and consumer cybersecurity solutions.
